TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog8_parain a _oemaw

S.FORM: korkoring kitkita ka 'aehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩正在看狗。
The child was looking at a dog.

S.FORM: 'ima kitkita ka takem ray binbinisitan 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 他正在看容器裡的青蛙。
He was looking at the frog inside the container.

S.FORM: korkoring ma'rem ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去睡覺了。
The child went to bed.

S.FORM: a takem kas'oehaz inaray binbinisitan kaslatar.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從容器裡出來。
The frog went out of the container.

S.FORM: korkoring 'okik ra:am ma'rem m'itol kita'en takem 'oka' ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩不知道, (當)他起來看, 青蛙不見了。
The child did not know and when he got up, the frog was gone.

S.FORM: sia mari' ka haehoeway 'aehae' 'am sbet ka 'aehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 他拿一個鞋子要打狗。
He took one shoe to beat the dog.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' moiti' ray moiti' ray binbinisitan 'izo' ka ta'oeloeh.
S.TRANSL: 狗把它的頭鑽到容器裡。
The dog stuck its head inside the container.

S.FORM: sia haewaeh ka hinoehas 'aehoe' ra:iw ila tkaw ilaila.
S.TRANSL: 他打開窗戶, 狗跳出去了。
He opened the window and the dog jumped away.

S.FORM: rima' noka korkoring rakepen 'aehoe' aewpoe'oen mwai' ray taew'an.
S.TRANSL: 他抓住狗帶他到屋子裡。
He caught the dog and carried it into the house.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila 'oe'oe ila si'oe'oe hini kabih.
S.TRANSL: 他往四處一直叫。
He kept calling in every direction.

S.FORM: hayza ka boya' boya' mwa:i' hayap ray korkoring ki 'aehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 有蜂飛往小孩和狗。
There were bees flying toward the boy and the dog.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' tobong ka boya'.
S.TRANSL: 狗對著蜂窩吠叫。
The dog barked at the bees.

S.FORM: korkoring masroko' isaa korkoring asengen noka boya'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩彎下腰, 蜂在叮他。
The child bent down and the bees were biting him.

S.FORM: hini 'aehoe' yo tobong lalenges lalengesen boya' kas'oehaz ila saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 狗對著蜂窩吠(而且)搖(樹), 搖一搖蜂全部都跑出來了。
The dog barked and shook the hive and the bees all came out.

S.FORM: hini takem ma' tikot ila.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙也害怕
The frog got afraid.

S.FORM: korkoring rima' ra:iw ray kaehoey babaw hayza ka roro'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩離開, 爬上有樹洞的樹頂。
The child left and climbed on top of the tree where there was a hole.

S.FORM: ray roro' 'izo' hayza ka 'oewi'.
S.TRANSL: 洞裡有貓頭鷹。
There was an owl inside the hole.

S.FORM: kas'oehaz korkoring homses.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來, 小孩嚇一跳。
The owl got out and the child got surprised.

S.FORM: maykonkonay sahae' ra ray ra:i'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩滾下來。
The child fell down rolling.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' noka boya' sowawen ila.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂正在追狗。
The bees were chasing the dog.

S.FORM: hini ko korkoring yo kababawawen noka 'oewi'.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹在小孩上面盤旋。
The owl was hovering over the child.

S.FORM: korkoring rima' tai'itol ray bato' babaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬到石頭上面。
The child climbed on top of a rock.

S.FORM: hayza ka wae'ae'.
S.TRANSL: 有鹿。
There was a deer.

S.FORM: ri'sa pakomoSa: pakomoSa: kaehoey nisia tikama'en ka kaeh'oeng.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抓住鹿角, 誤以為是樹枝
The child grabbed on a tree branch which turned out to be the deer's antler.

S.FORM: noka wae'ae' si'in'itol sia hoe'oengen kibabawen ray ta'oeloeh pa'ae'ae:aew ila.
S.TRANSL: 鹿把他頂在頭上, 然後跑走了。
The deer lifted him over its head and ran away.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' tobong ila ma'oenhael ra:iw ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗也在吠, 然後一起跑走了。
The dog also barked and they left together.

S.FORM: rima' nisia noka wae'ae' paksahae'en ray 'ataS ila hini kamasal.
S.TRANSL: 鹿把他們帶到懸崖上, 把他們丟下去。
The deer took them to a cliff where it threw them over.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh ki 'aehoe' sahae' ila o: rima' potngor ray wasal.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗都被丟到水裡。
Both the boy and the dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh minsa'la'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩先，
The boy first,

S.FORM: 'aehoe' maybiil.
S.TRANSL: 再來是狗。
The dog followed.

S.FORM: nisia 'aewpoe'oen ka 'aehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 他帶著狗。
He carried the dog.

S.FORM: sikas'oemaeh ila kas'oemaeh ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們往岸邊移動。
They moved toward the land.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' palangoyon amaray horok 'am kababaw.
S.TRANSL: 狗(在小孩肩上)游泳上岸。
The dog swam and moved over the ground.

S.FORM: korkoring koSa: saksakaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩叫狗安靜。
The child told the dog to move silently.

S.FORM: lasia saksakaw maray maray roro' babaw onkosa'en ila o: kita'en hayza' ka takem roSa' riza.
S.TRANSL: 他們輕輕地穿過洞, 然後看到兩隻青蛙。
They moved slowly through the hole and saw two frogs.

S.FORM: sia kita' ka takem hiza honay babaw.
S.TRANSL: 他看到青蛙在那上面。
He saw the frog there on top.

S.FORM: kita' saksaakaw ra:iw ila para:iw ila ilahato noka 'aehoe' ki korkoring.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗輕輕地離開。
The boy and the dog left slowly.

S.FORM: hiza takem ray roro' babaw 'ima saze:ez 'ima saze:ez 'oka' ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在洞上面一直瞪著看。
The frogs on top of the hole kept on staring them.
